title: Students page mobile UX: add tabs, remove clutter
description:
dispatched_by: mayor

Improve mobile UX for admin students page:

Files: 
- src/app/(dashboard)/admin/students/page.tsx
- src/app/(dashboard)/admin/students/students-list.tsx

Changes needed:
1. Add tabs for filtering/organizing students (e.g., 'Todos', 'Ativos', 'Recentes')
2. Remove verbose info from student cards:
   - Remove 'Criado em' date (line 79-81 in students-list.tsx)
   - Simplify or remove treinos count badge (less prominent)
3. Make cards more compact for mobile
4. Keep it clean and action-focused

Reference the admin dashboard redesign for style consistency.

IMPORTANT: Run pnpm build and ensure it passes before pushing.
close_reason: Merged to main: Students page mobile UX with tabs and simplified cards

title: Rebase conflict: polecat/slit-mkic69bg
description:
Your branch conflicts with main after fi-ann (diet feature) was merged.

Conflict in: src/app/aluno/page.tsx

The issue: Your error handling refactor (using api client) conflicts with the diet feature which added new fetch calls using the old pattern.

To resolve:
1. Rebase your branch on current main
2. Update the diet fetching code in src/app/aluno/page.tsx to use the api client pattern
3. Resubmit to merge queue

The diet fetch code (lines 101-109 in the merged version) needs to be converted to use the api.get pattern like your trainings fetch.

title: fi-6rn: Verification Complete - No Changes Needed
description:
Investigation Summary: Show Exercise Weight in Student Dashboard

Status: NOT A BUG - Feature is working correctly

Verified:
1. Schema: load field exists as String?
2. Training Detail Page: Shows Carga correctly for each exercise
3. API: Returns all exercise data including load field
4. Dashboard: Shows training preview cards (intentional UX)

Current User Flow:
- Student sees training list on /aluno with summary cards
- Clicks a training → navigates to /aluno/trainings/[id]
- All exercise details including Carga (weight) are visible

Conclusion: The exercise weight IS visible - students click into a training to see details. This follows standard list-detail pattern. No code changes needed.

title: Comprehensive Mixpanel client-side instrumentation
description:
dispatched_by: mayor

BRANCH: staging ONLY

The previous Mixpanel work was shallow. Need COMPREHENSIVE client-side instrumentation:

1. PAGE VIEW TRACKING - Every page must track when user visits:
   - Track 'Page Viewed' event with page name, path, referrer
   - Add to ALL pages in src/app/

2. BUTTON/CTA TRACKING - Every interactive element:
   - All buttons, links, CTAs must fire click events
   - Include button text, location, destination
   - Cover: navbar, footer, hero sections, forms, cards

3. FORM INTERACTIONS:
   - Form started, form submitted, form abandoned
   - Field focus/blur for key fields
   - Validation errors

4. USER JOURNEY EVENTS:
   - Signup flow steps
   - Checkout/payment flow steps  
   - Product views, add to cart
   - Search queries

5. ERROR TRACKING:
   - API errors, form validation errors
   - Page load failures

Create a usePageView hook, useTrackClick hook for reusability.
Update EVENT_MAP.md with ALL new events.

This should result in 50+ new tracking points across the app.

title: Incluir: Refactor volunteer scheduling flow + admin view
description:
dispatched_by: mayor

Two changes needed:

1. SCHEDULING FLOW REFACTOR:
   Current: apps/frontend/src/app/agendamento/ - user enters name+contact
   New flow:
   - Step 1: User enters EMAIL
   - Step 2: Query volunteers table (src/backend/voluntariado/db.ts) by email
   - Step 3: If found, show 'Olá, {fullName}!' and allow date/slot selection
   - Step 4: Remove phone/name input (use volunteer data)
   - Step 5: Store in test_slots with volunteer email (add email column to schema)
   - If not found: show 'Email não encontrado. Por favor, cadastre-se primeiro em /voluntariado'

   Files to modify:
   - src/backend/agendamento/db.ts - add email column, add getVolunteerByEmail query
   - src/app/agendamento/scheduling-form.tsx - change flow to email-first
   - src/app/agendamento/actions.ts - update reservation logic

2. ADMIN VIEW UPDATE:
   File: apps/frontend/src/app/home/gestao-de-pessoas/voluntarios/page.tsx
   
   - Add scheduled test info to VolunteerData (query test_slots by email)
   - In volunteer list/tabs, show: 'Agendamento: 31/01 08:00-10:00' or 'Não agendado'
   - Update getVolunteers.ts to join with test_slots data

Reference files:
- Volunteer DB: src/backend/voluntariado/db.ts (volunteers table)
- Scheduling DB: src/backend/agendamento/db.ts (test_slots table)
- VolunteerData type: src/backend/voluntariado/getVolunteers.ts
